The [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] '''Evader-GT Ion Drive''' was a scaled down military grade [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drive]] for commercial availability. It costs only 50,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], plus a 5,000 credit fee, for those that would license the engine with the Empire, and weighed 16 metric tons.

*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->[[Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters'', Second Edition]]
